creator: jean-francois.dockes@wanadoo.fr
text:
On my system, after applying the patch, I seem to need to add two lines to
the pkg-plist for the documentation cleanup to succeed:

%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%/apidoc/html
%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%/apidoc

Don't know if adding the lines is the correct fix though?

jf


Edwin Groothuis writes:
 > Maintainer of databases/xapian-core,

 > Please note that PR ports/105746 has just been submitted.

 > you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
 > and a committer will take care of it.
 > 
 > The full text of the PR can be found at:
